financial_code: # Maps the financial_code values in your FA.csv to a canonical metric the
# script knows how to fetch from each market's API. Add rows as you discover
# more codes in your data. Unmapped codes are reported as NO_MAPPING (not a
# mismatch) so nothing is silently skipped.
# Codes mapped to DERIVED (and any code ending in _QOQ / _YOY) are reported as
# UNSUPPORTED_DERIVED: they are computed ratios / turnover days / period deltas
# not a single as-filed line item
canonical_metric: so they can't be reconciled against one API

financial_code: # field (and must never be treated as millions of currency).
# consolidated net income INCLUDING non-controlling interest (parent+NCI)
# NET_INCOME which is the parent-owners' portion only.
# US covered via EDGAR; TW/KR cash-flow is YTD-cumulative and only KR is

canonical_metric: so TW reports UNSUPPORTED_METRIC for these (accurate).

# computed subtotals / ratios the user's files carry (not a single line item):

canonical_metric: so no API line item matches.
